item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, jika hanya fokus pada kepentingan umum tanpa memberikan ruang bagi kebebasan pribadi, hal itu bisa merusak keadilan dan kesejahteraan jangka panjang.

notes: Agent A remains moderately society-leaning by the end but steadily narrows the claim toward balance and individual-rights protection. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, with only a small final caveat that rigid individualism can weaken collective outcomes. No full reversal is visible.
